message:
🌱 Add ko: ko stops building containers after Golang updates mission (#804)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ko-106-ko-stops-building-containers-after-golang-updates",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ko: ko stops building containers after Golang updates",
+    "description": "ko stops building containers after Golang updates. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check ko installation",
+        "description": "Verify your ko installation:\n```bash\nko version\n```\nInstall if needed: `go install github.com/google/ko@latest` or `brew install ko`. ko builds Go container images without Docker."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the issue context",
+        "description": "After each minor Golang version bump (e.g. 1.13.2 -> 1.13.3), `ko apply` no longer builds container images but happily applies the yaml untransformed, which leads with image pull errors on the cluster."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ko stops building containers after Golang updates",
+        "description": "I think we've improved this situation by surfacing better errors and requiring `ko://`, but I'm not sure if the underlying problem is actually fixed. This reminds me of [a discussion on slack](https://knative.slack.com/archives/CAVRMBUMA/p1608591221217100) where the issue involved homebrew, and the\n```yaml\n$ go env\nGO111MODULE=\"\"\nGOARCH=\"amd64\"\nGOBIN=\"\"\nGOCACHE=\"/Users/scothis/Library/Caches/go-build\"\nGOENV=\"/Users/scothis/Library/Application Support/go/env\"\nGOEXE=\"\"\nGOFLAGS=\"\"\nGOHOSTARCH=\"amd64\"\nGOHOSTOS=\"darwin\"\nGONOPROXY=\"\"\nGONOSUMDB=\"\"\nGOOS=\"darwin\"\nGOPATH=\"/Users/scothis/Development/go\"\nGOPRIVATE=\"\"\nGOPROXY=\"https://proxy.golang.org,direct\"\nGOROOT=\"/usr/local/Cellar/go/1.13.4/libexec\"\nGOSUMDB=\"sum.golang.org\"\nGOTMPDIR=\"\"\nGOTOOLDIR=\"/usr/local/Cellar/go/1.13.4/libexec/pkg/tool/darwin_amd64\"\nGCCGO=\"gccgo\"\nAR=\"ar\"\nCC=\"clang\"\nCXX=\"clang++\"\nCGO_ENABLED=\"1\"\nGOMOD=\"<snip>\"\nCGO_CFLAGS=\"-g -O2\"\nCGO_\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the fix",
+        "description": "Test that the fix is working as expected:\n```bash\nko version\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"ko stops building containers after Golang updates\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I think we've improved this situation by surfacing better errors and requiring `ko://`, but I'm not sure if the underlying problem is actually fixed.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ go env\nGO111MODULE=\"\"\nGOARCH=\"amd64\"\nGOBIN=\"\"\nGOCACHE=\"/Users/scothis/Library/Caches/go-build\"\nGOENV=\"/Users/scothis/Library/Application Support/go/env\"\nGOEXE=\"\"\nGOFLAGS=\"\"\nGOHOSTARCH=\"amd64\"\nGOHOSTOS=\"darwin\"\nGONOPROXY=\"\"\nGONOSUMDB=\"\"\nGOOS=\"darwin\"\nGOPATH=\"/Users/scothis/Development/go\"\nGOPRIVATE=\"\"\nGOPROXY=\"https://proxy.golang.org,direct\"\nGOROOT=\"/usr/local/Cellar/go/1.13.4/libexec\"\nGOSUMDB=\"sum.golang.org\"\nGOTMPDIR=\"\"\nGOTOOLDIR=\"/usr/local/Cellar/go/1.13.4/libexec/pkg/tool/darwin_amd64\"\nGCCGO=\"gccgo\"\nAR=\"ar\"\nCC=\"clang\"\nCXX=\"clang++\"\nCGO_ENABLED=\"1\"\nGOMOD=\"<snip>\"\nCGO_CFLAGS=\"-g -O2\"\nCGO_CPPFLAGS=\"\"\nCGO_CXXFLAGS=\"-g -O2\"\nCGO_FFLAGS=\"-g -O2\"\nCGO_LDFLAGS=\"-g -O2\"\nPKG_CONFIG=\"pkg-config\"\nGOGCCFLAGS=\"-fPIC -m64 -pthread -fno-caret-diagnostics -Qunused-arguments -fmessage-length=0 -fdebug-",
+        "$ go list -mod=readonly -m -json",
+        "$ export GOROOT=/usr/local/go"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "ko",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "ko"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/ko-build/ko/issues/106",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/ko-build/ko"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 15,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "ko",
+      "go"
+    ],
+    "description": "Go 1.21+ and ko installed. ko is a CLI tool for building Go container images, not a Kubernetes workload."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:36:02.814Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
